📖 The Bible Says — Volume 2

2,500 Posts · 4 Categories · All NIV

⚠️ All verses in NIV. Note: NIV is copyrighted (Biblica) with a 500-verse limit for use without written permission. This volume exceeds that. Keep your KJV library as the copyright-safe fallback.
✝️ Jesus Said (1000) 🙏 Prayer (500) 💡 Words of Wisdom (500) 🔥 Faith Declaration (500)
✝️ Jesus Said1000 posts
#1Jesus SaidMatthew
Jesus said:"Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest." — Matthew 11:28 NIV
Create a vertical (3:4 ratio) photorealistic image. Jesus standing with arms gently outstretched, warm golden light radiating from him, facing the viewer with deep compassion. Dark background. Natural realistic colors as if shot on a DSLR camera, no color grading, no filters. Compose the image with the text and main subject naturally centered in the frame. In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: first "Jesus said:" in slightly smaller text, then below in larger text: "Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest." then directly below with no gap, in much smaller subtle text: — Matthew 11:28 NIV. At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
Jesus said: "Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest." — Matthew 11:28 NIV His words still speak today. #TheBibleSays #JesusSaid #NIV #Jesus #Faith

Natural realistic colors as if shot on a DSLR camera, no color grading, no filters. Compose the image with the text and main subject naturally centered in the frame. In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: first "Jesus said:" in slightly smaller text, then below in larger text: "The things that are impossible with people are possible with God." then directly below with no gap, in much smaller subtle text: — Luke 18:27 NIV. At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
Jesus said: "The things that are impossible with people are possible with God." — Luke 18:27 NIV His words still speak today. #TheBibleSays #JesusSaid #NIV #Jesus #Faith

At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.

Create a vertical (3:4 ratio) photorealistic image. Jesus ascending a mountain path, seen from behind, his robe flowing. Epic landscape, dramatic clouds. Leading the way. Natural realistic colors as if shot on a DSLR camera, no color grading, no filters. Compose the image with the text and main subject naturally centered in the frame. In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: first "Jesus said:" in slightly smaller text, then below in larger text: "If you hold to my teaching, you are really my disciples." then directly below with no gap, in much smaller subtle text: — John 8:31 NIV. At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
Jesus said: "If you hold to my teaching, you are really my disciples." — John 8:31 NIV His words still speak today. #TheBibleSays #JesusSaid #NIV #Jesus #Faith

Create a vertical (3:4 ratio) photorealistic image. Jesus sitting alone on a rock by a river, reflective, peaceful. Morning mist on the water. Contemplative natural light. Natural realistic colors as if shot on a DSLR camera, no color grading, no filters. Compose the image with the text and main subject naturally centered in the frame. In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: first "Jesus said:" in slightly smaller text, then below in larger text: "Whoever finds their life will lose it, and whoever loses their life for my sake will find it." then directly below with no gap, in much smaller subtle text: — Matthew 10:39 NIV. At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
Jesus said: "Whoever finds their life will lose it, and whoever loses their life for my sake will find it." — Matthew 10:39 NIV His words still speak today. #TheBibleSays #JesusSaid #NIV #Jesus #Faith

Natural realistic colors as if shot on a DSLR camera, no color grading, no filters. Compose the image with the text and main subject naturally centered in the frame. In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: first in smaller elegant text "A Prayer for Forgiveness" then below: "My Lord, free my heart from bitterness. I believe you. Amen.". At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
My Lord, free my heart from bitterness. I believe you. Amen. Pray this today. 🙏 #TheBibleSays #Prayer #Forgiveness #NIV #Faith

In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: first in smaller elegant text "A Prayer for Forgiveness" then below: "My Lord, teach me to forgive as you forgave me. In Jesus' name, Amen.". At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
My Lord, teach me to forgive as you forgave me. In Jesus' name, Amen. Pray this today. 🙏 #TheBibleSays #Prayer #Forgiveness #NIV #Faith

In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: first in smaller elegant text "A Prayer for Guidance" then below: "My Lord, help me follow where you lead. In Jesus' name, Amen.". At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
My Lord, help me follow where you lead. In Jesus' name, Amen. Pray this today. 🙏 #TheBibleSays #Prayer #Guidance #NIV #Faith

Create a vertical (3:4 ratio) photorealistic image. Jesus walking on water in calm moonlight, his robe flowing. Silver-blue water, peaceful night sky. Supernatural serenity. Natural realistic colors as if shot on a DSLR camera, no color grading, no filters. Compose the image with the text and main subject naturally centered in the frame. In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: first in smaller elegant text "A Prayer for Family" then below: "Heavenly Father, save the lost in my family. Have your way. Amen.". At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
Heavenly Father, save the lost in my family. Have your way. Amen. Pray this today. 🙏 #TheBibleSays #Prayer #Family #NIV #Faith

In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: first in smaller elegant text "A Prayer for Comfort" then below: "Father, comfort everyone who is hurting tonight. Amen.". At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
Father, comfort everyone who is hurting tonight. Amen. Pray this today. 🙏 #TheBibleSays #Prayer #Comfort #NIV #Faith

Natural realistic colors as if shot on a DSLR camera, no color grading, no filters. Compose the image with the text and main subject naturally centered in the frame. In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: first in smaller elegant text "A Prayer for Strength" then below: "Lord, give me power to keep going one more day. Have your way. Amen.". At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
Lord, give me power to keep going one more day. Have your way. Amen. Pray this today. 🙏 #TheBibleSays #Prayer #Strength #NIV #Faith

Natural realistic colors as if shot on a DSLR camera, no color grading, no filters. Compose the image with the text and main subject naturally centered in the frame. In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: first in smaller elegant text "A Prayer for Provision" then below: "Jesus, multiply the little I have. Amen.". At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
Jesus, multiply the little I have. Amen. Pray this today. 🙏 #TheBibleSays #Prayer #Provision #NIV #Faith

Natural realistic colors as if shot on a DSLR camera, no color grading, no filters. Compose the image with the text and main subject naturally centered in the frame. In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: first in smaller elegant text "A Prayer for Guidance" then below: "Lord Jesus, guide my decisions today. Have your way. Amen.". At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
Lord Jesus, guide my decisions today. Have your way. Amen. Pray this today. 🙏 #TheBibleSays #Prayer #Guidance #NIV #Faith

In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: first in smaller elegant text "A Prayer for Comfort" then below: "Lord Jesus, remind me I am not alone. Amen.". At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
Lord Jesus, remind me I am not alone. Amen. Pray this today. 🙏 #TheBibleSays #Prayer #Comfort #NIV #Faith

Natural realistic colors as if shot on a DSLR camera, no color grading, no filters. Compose the image with the text and main subject naturally centered in the frame. In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: "Waiting is not doing nothing; it is trusting someone.". At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.

Natural realistic colors as if shot on a DSLR camera, no color grading, no filters. Compose the image with the text and main subject naturally centered in the frame. In the center of the image, display directly on the image (no text box, no background panel) in bold white serif typography with a strong drop shadow for readability: "The world has enough critics; be an encourager.". At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
The world has enough critics; be an encourager. #TheBibleSays #Wisdom #Faith #ChristianWisdom #DailyFaith

Create a vertical (3:4 ratio) photorealistic image. A vast starry night sky over silhouetted hills, a small figure looking up. Deep blue-black, awe. At the bottom of the image in very small subtle white text: The Bible Says.
